missingEdge: The accepted T2 contract chain binds Kernel admission to a Refinery-produced packet via content_hash equality (RefineryPacketRef.content_hash == EvaluateInput.packetHash). SOT3-T8 implements the canonical algorithm as an owned, versioned Refinery export (cvf.sotThreeLayer.refineryPacketHash.v1, computeRefineryPacketHash) with a published fixed test vector, migrates the T6 integration slice to consume it directly, and documents the profile in the canonical SOT contract chain reference.

citations.lineOrSection: Findings / Position; Dependency-Closure Matrix row `packet binding`
citations.evidenceRole: reviewer finding that the T6 local hash helper was adequate for the bounded slice but did not create an owner-level Refinery-to-Kernel hash contract (superseded by T8 owner creation)
authorized the bounded no-commit contract tranche this GAP update reflects
the new Refinery-owned canonical packet-binding hash implementation

citations.lineOrSection: fixed 1337-byte preimage and SHA-256 digest vector; mutation, ordering, and unsupported-value rejection tests
citations.evidenceRole: proves deterministic, field-stable, fail-closed canonicalization; 11 tests pass

citations.lineOrSection: RefineryPacket Packet-Binding Hash Canonical Profile subsection
citations.evidenceRole: documents the owning package, field projection, canonicalization, digest format, rejection rule, versioning, and published vector

impact: Was: any future caller needed to independently invent or copy a packet-hash derivation, risking divergent, non-interoperable hash algorithms. Now: one Refinery-owned, versioned, tested algorithm exists and the T6 slice consumes it directly. Remaining impact is limited to activation, adapter, provider/live, and public-sync claims, none of which this GAP closure asserts.

closeCondition.conditionText: SATISFIED: a source-verified SOT3-T8 tranche defines the canonical Refinery-to-Kernel packet-binding hash contract (cvf.sotThreeLayer.refineryPacketHash.v1), implements it as a Refinery-owned export with a published fixed vector, migrates the T6 slice to the owner API, and a reviewer accepts a completion review naming its owner path.

reopenCondition.conditionText: Reopen only if a future review finds the EXTENSIONS/CVF_REFINERY/src/packet-hash/packet-hash.ts owner path removed, superseded, or materially non-functional, or if an operator authorizes a second competing hash profile or a field-projection change that requires a fresh reconciliation.

boundaryCaveat: Does not claim package activation, an execution adapter, provider/live proof, public-sync readiness, or production readiness. Does not claim any change to Kernel or Flow source; Kernel admission equality semantics are unchanged and remain fail-closed on a genuine mismatch. Does not claim a second hash profile exists; exactly one profile (cvf.sotThreeLayer.refineryPacketHash.v1) is owned and callable. Private-provenance implementation only, pending reviewer acceptance.

negativeSearchEvidence.searchResult: Prior to this tranche only a caller-local T6 helper existed; after this tranche, the sole packet-hash producer is EXTENSIONS/CVF_REFINERY/src/packet-hash/packet-hash.ts, exported by cvf-refinery and consumed directly by the T6 slice with no local re-implementation.
